# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: your-docker-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          runAsNonRoot: true
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: microservices-app
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: your-domain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-app-service
            port:
              number: 80
